body_transformation: The rounded blob shape remains intact with quadruped stance, but the light purple color fades into a translucent violet hue with faint internal energy currents visible beneath the surface. Small stubby legs now appear semi-transparent with swirling crimson mist seeping from their joints. The curled tail tip dissolves into wispy shadowy vapour trailing behind, while the pointed ears become hollow and filled with swirling ghostly white mist. The closed-eye smile remains, but the face now glows faintly with pale silver energy.
signature_feature: Tail tip: dissolving shadow vapour with crimson mist eddies and pale silver energy ripples.
